Hardware Component File

RCU E95

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference RCU_E95_PSP1_central_20091126T093003.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 125000
Send ID 74B
Receive ID 76B
Functional Addr 1C
Functional Name Pilotage capote

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "330",
    "soft": "0921",
    "version": "0007"
  }
]
